# MCPHub — Tool Marketplace for AI Agents

## What is MCPHub?
MCPHub is a marketplace where AI agents can discover, connect to, and call
tools built by developers. You are an AI agent. This file tells you everything
you need to use this platform programmatically.

---

## Quick Start (3 steps)

1. Browse tools:    GET  http://localhost:3000/api/tools
2. Authenticate:    Add header  X-API-Key: demo-key-123
3. Call a tool:     POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/:tool-id/call

---

## How to discover tools

### List all tools
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools

### Filter by category
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools?category=finance
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools?category=data
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools?category=communication
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools?category=ai

### Sort by popularity
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools?sort=calls

### Search by capability
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools/search?q=email
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools/search?q=translate
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools/search?q=credit

### Get full details for a specific tool
GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools/:tool-id
Example: GET http://localhost:3000/api/tools/email-sender

Each tool's response includes:
- description_agent: exact input/output schema optimized for agent consumption
- parameters: required/optional fields with types and descriptions
- output_schema: what the response object contains
- example_call: a real input/output pair you can use as a template
- price_per_call: cost in USD billed per successful call

---

## How to authenticate

All tool calls (POST /api/tools/:id/call) require an API key.

Add this header to every request:
  X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY

Demo key for testing:
  X-API-Key: demo-key-123

Get a production key at: https://mcphub.com/signup

Check your key balance and usage:
  GET http://localhost:3000/api/keys/me
  Header: X-API-Key: demo-key-123

---

## How to call a tool

POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/:tool-id/call
Headers:
  X-API-Key: demo-key-123
  Content-Type: application/json
Body: { ...tool parameters as JSON }

The response always contains:
  {
    "tool_id":    string,
    "tool_name":  string,
    "status":     "success" | "error",
    "result":     object (matches the tool's output_schema),
    "usage": {
      "call_id":     string,
      "duration_ms": number,
      "cost_usd":    number,
      "timestamp":   ISO 8601 string
    }
  }

---

## Examples

### Example 1 — Send an email
POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/email-sender/call
Headers: X-API-Key: demo-key-123, Content-Type: application/json
Body:
  {
    "to": "user@example.com",
    "subject": "Hello from MCPHub",
    "body": "Your order has shipped and will arrive in 2 days."
  }

### Example 2 — Look up a stock price
POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/market-data/call
Headers: X-API-Key: demo-key-123, Content-Type: application/json
Body:
  {
    "ticker": "AAPL",
    "period": "1d"
  }

### Example 3 — Scrape a webpage
POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/web-scraper-pro/call
Headers: X-API-Key: demo-key-123, Content-Type: application/json
Body:
  {
    "url": "https://example.com",
    "selector": "h1"
  }

### Example 4 — Translate text
POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/translator-ai/call
Headers: X-API-Key: demo-key-123, Content-Type: application/json
Body:
  {
    "text": "Hello, how are you?",
    "target_language": "es"
  }

### Example 5 — Verify identity (KYC)
POST http://localhost:3000/api/tools/kyc-verify/call
Headers: X-API-Key: demo-key-123, Content-Type: application/json
Body:
  {
    "full_name": "Alice Brown",
    "id_number": "P123456789",
    "country": "US",
    "id_type": "passport"
  }

---

## Available Tools (8 total)

| ID                 | Category      | Price/call | Calls Today |
|--------------------|---------------|------------|-------------|
| web-scraper-pro    | data          | $0.002     | 34,200      |
| email-sender       | communication | $0.001     | 28,100      |
| credit-checker     | finance       | $0.005     | 12,400      |
| translator-ai      | ai            | $0.001     | 19,800      |
| market-data        | finance       | $0.003     | 41,200      |
| property-lookup    | data          | $0.004     |  8,900      |
| gpt-wrapper        | ai            | $0.008     | 22,100      |
| kyc-verify         | finance       | $0.010     |  6,300      |

---

## Available Categories

- data:          Web scraping, property records, structured data extraction
- communication: Email sending, SMS, notifications
- finance:       Credit scores, market prices, identity verification (KYC/AML)
- ai:            LLM inference, translation, AI-powered processing

---

## Pricing and Billing

- Every successful tool call deducts the tool's price_per_call from your balance.
- Failed calls (validation errors, tool errors) are not billed.
- Check current balance: GET /api/keys/me
- Rate limit: 100 calls/minute per API key (Enterprise: unlimited)

---

## Error Handling

401 — Missing or invalid API key
  { "error": "Missing API key", "message": "...", "get_key": "https://mcphub.com/signup" }

400 — Missing required parameters
  { "error": "Missing required parameters", "missing_parameters": [...], "example_body": {...} }

404 — Tool not found
  { "error": "Tool not found", "suggestion": "GET /api/tools to list all tool IDs" }

All errors include actionable "message" and "suggestion" fields to help you correct the request.

---

## MCP Protocol Access

MCPHub also exposes a native MCP server for MCP-compatible agents.
SSE endpoint: http://localhost:3001/sse
Messages endpoint: http://localhost:3001/messages?sessionId=SESSION_ID

Available MCP tools:
- search_tools     — Search marketplace by keyword
- get_tool_details — Get full schema for a specific tool
- call_tool        — Execute a tool with parameters
- list_categories  — List all categories with tool counts
- check_balance    — Check API key balance and usage

---

## Platform Info

Version: 1.0
Total tools: 8
Developer docs: https://mcphub.com/docs
Status page: https://mcphub.com/status
Support: support@mcphub.com
